rules: Marketplace manifest (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json) version must match each plugin's own plugin.json version
Skills must live at plugins/<name>/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, user-invocable, allowed-tools)
Agents must live at plugins/<name>/agents/<agent-name>.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, model, tools, maxTurns)
Plugin manifest (plugin.json) must use './skills' with ./ prefix for the skills path — bare names cause validation errors
Knowledge docs must live in docs/ with YAML frontmatter (title, type, tags, created, updated) and follow the tier hierarchy: domain > decisions > specs
Skills and agents must not contain executable code — they are pure markdown instructions with YAML frontmatter
Each plugin is self-contained under plugins/<name>/ — no cross-plugin imports or shared files between plugins

versioning: Bump plugins/ritual/.claude-plugin/plugin.json version and .claude-plugin/marketplace.json ritual entry version in sync for all changes

implementation: All markdown files must have valid YAML frontmatter matching the required schema for their type (skill vs agent)
Keep agent instructions concise — prefer structured steps over prose
When adding new skills, ensure allowed-tools is the minimal set needed
Prefer explicit tool lists over wildcards in agent frontmatter
review: Verify marketplace.json version matches plugin.json version on every change
Check that skill/agent frontmatter fields are complete and well-formed
Flag any cross-plugin dependencies — plugins must be self-contained
Ensure new skills have user-invocable and disable-model-invocation set explicitly
documentation: Knowledge docs must use YAML frontmatter with title, type, tags, created, updated
Use lowercase hyphen-separated tags matching module/directory names
Keep specs actionable — each spec should map to implementable work
delivery: Always bump version in both plugin.json and marketplace.json together
PR titles should match the conventional commit type of the primary change
triage: Default classification is docs unless structural changes to manifests or new skills/agents are involved
New skills or agents are feat, manifest fixes are fix, reorganization is refactor
